creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: We've had substantial improvements to umass since FreeBSD 6. This includes issues with reading the blocks to do the geom tasting as well, which I think was the root cause of this issue. Closing it as OBE due to these rewrites. Should this still be a problem with FreeBSD 11 or 12, please file a new bug and CC me so we can get to the bottom of this.
